title: rubus zandjanicus
intro: Rubus zandjanicus, also known as the Zandjan Raspberry, is a species of bramble in the Rubus genus. It is native to Iran, where it is commonly used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is said to have anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Rubus zandjanicus can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in topical applications for skin issues such as wounds and eczema.
